summary: Card Reuse During Invitation Acceptance - Feature verified working. User with saved card (testuser_audit@nlyt.app) gets reused_card=true, requires_guarantee=false when accepting invitations. User without saved card correctly gets Stripe redirect. Backend logs confirm: [GUARANTEE] Reused saved card pm_dev_5400be0a...

backend_pytest: ✅ User WITHOUT saved card gets requires_guarantee=true, checkout_url (Stripe redirect)
manual_verification: ✅ login-and-accept endpoint with saved card returns reused_card=true
✅ Participant updated to accepted_guaranteed with correct stripe_payment_method_id
✅ Backend logs show: [GUARANTEE] Reused saved card pm_dev_5400be0a...
code_review: ✅ respond_to_invitation endpoint (line ~330) checks for saved card before Stripe
✅ login_and_accept endpoint (line ~660) checks for saved card before Stripe
✅ Both endpoints call create_guarantee_with_saved_card() when user has saved card

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ create_guarantee_with_saved_card() correctly creates guarantee with status=completed, reused_card=true
✅ Method updates participant to accepted_guaranteed with correct stripe_payment_method_id
✅ respond_to_invitation checks user.default_payment_method_id and stripe_customer_id before Stripe redirect
✅ login_and_accept checks user.default_payment_method_id and stripe_customer_id before Stripe redirect
✅ Frontend InvitationPage.js handles reused_card response correctly (shows success message, no redirect)

success_rate.backend: 100% (5/5 pytest tests passed, 2 skipped due to test setup limitation)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Card reuse feature verified working. Test user testuser_audit@nlyt.app has saved card (pm_dev_5400be0a). When this user accepts an invitation via login-and-accept endpoint, the response includes reused_card=true, requires_guarantee=false, status=accepted_guaranteed. The guarantee is created with status=completed and reused_card=true. Backend logs confirm card reuse. Stripe API key is test placeholder (dev mode).

respond_to_invitation_card_reuse.details: Lines 319-349 in invitations.py check for saved card and call create_guarantee_with_saved_card()

login_and_accept_card_reuse.details: Lines 656-679 in invitations.py check for saved card and call create_guarantee_with_saved_card()

create_guarantee_with_saved_card.details: Lines 37-92 in stripe_guarantee_service.py creates guarantee with status=completed, reused_card=true

frontend_handles_reused_card.details: InvitationPage.js lines 185-186 and 216-219 handle reused_card response

mocked_apis.Stripe: Dev mode - payment methods are pm_dev_* format, no real Stripe calls
